plugins.prepareCmd: npm version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --allow-same-version && node -e "for(const f of ['.claude-plugin/plugin.json','.claude-plugin/marketplace.json']){const j=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8'));j.version='${nextRelease.version}';if(j.plugins)j.plugins.forEach(p=>p.version='${nextRelease.version}');require('fs').writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')};for(const f of ['dart/ultra_flutter/pubspec.yaml','dart/ultra_flutter_devtools/pubspec.yaml']){let y=require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8');y=y.replace(/^version:\s*.+$/m,'version: ${nextRelease.version}');require('fs').writeFileSync(f,y)}" && npx prettier --write .claude-plugin/plugin.json .claude-plugin/marketplace.json && git add -f packages/*/dist/bin.cjs
